news.title: Sergio Herman stopt met zijn 2 restaurants in Antwerpen: "Terugkeren naar natuur en mezelf" - VRT
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Sergio Herman is closing both of his restaurants in Antwerp, Belgium, stating he wants to "return to nature and myself." This is significant for food lovers visiting Antwerp, as Herman's restaurants were among the city's most prestigious dining destinations. His departure marks a major shift in the local fine dining scene and removes two notable culinary options from the city's restaurant landscape.
